testcase.name: BookingFlow
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 146 Current browser version is 145.0.7632.160 with binary path C:\Program goog:chromeOptions: {args: [--headless=new, --window-size=1920,1200, --no-sandbox, --disable-dev-shm-usage, --disable-notifications, --disable-infobars, --remote-allow-origins=*], extensions: []}}],
